steps.title: Translate "15% of the bill" into a calculation
steps.content: The tip equals 15% of the bill amount. Convert the percent to a decimal and multiply: $$\text{Tip} = 0.15 \times 78.20$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
Find the choice closest to \$11.73:
  • A) \$8.00 — off by \$3.73, too low.
  • B) \$10.00 — off by \$1.73, still low.
  • C) \$12.00 — off by only \$0.27, the closest value.
  • D) \$14.00 — off by \$2.27, too high.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
